morning_reference_narrative: Morning's ETH call is in play. Price tested $1,890 twice in the past two hours on rising volume. Hasn't broken $1,880 yet but bids are thinning. SOL faded — rejected at $143.50 on weak volume.

assets.narrative: Tested $1,890 twice, volume rising. Funding ticked up to +0.072%. Bids thinning at $1,880. Setup still valid and looking more likely.
Faded. Rejected at $143.50 on weak volume, back to $141. Setup still valid but momentum isn't there.

setups.narrative: Conviction higher after two tests. Funding still rising. Same levels, higher probability.
Carrying forward but less conviction. Momentum faded after morning rejection.

market_narrative: Morning read playing out. ETH tightening toward the level, SOL lost momentum. BTC range continues. No new setups. Same levels, updated conviction.
